nr.notes: NR hunting license $160 + $15 app fee. Tag cost if drawn varies by hunt code — verify at azgfd.com. Non-permit OTC elk tags exist for specific management/conflict units (~$650 NR).

pointSystem.notes: Bonus points. 80% of tags via bonus draw, 10% pure random, 10% max-points pool. World-class units take 10–20 years.

otc.notes: Limited non-permit OTC elk tags for management/conflict units only — unit-specific. Verify availability at azgfd.com.
